subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him whose countenance hath been illumined by the lights of his Lord's Face, and who hath stood firm in the Cause of his Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی استضاء وجهه بانوار وجه ربه و استقام علی امر مولاه
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love of God
